job.title: Software Developer AI/ML
job.description:
About

NeuroHire is a Texas-based SaaS company building AI-powered hiring solutions that help organizations identify talent based on real skills, experience, and potential.
Our platform combines scalable software systems with AI-driven workflows to improve how candidates are matched, analyzed, and recommended. We’re looking for developers who enjoy building strong product systems while working with modern AI and machine learning technologies.

Role Overview

As a Software Developer (AI/ML Focus), you will work on backend systems, APIs, and intelligent product features that power the NeuroHire platform.

This role is ideal for someone with strong software engineering fundamentals who also has exposure to AI/ML technologies and enjoys building data-driven applications.

You’ll collaborate closely with AI engineers, data scientists, and product teams to develop scalable, production-ready solutions.

What You’ll Work On

Design and develop scalable backend services and APIs
Build software systems that support AI-powered product features
Integrate machine learning models and AI workflows into production environments
Work with structured and unstructured datasets for intelligent processing
Support features such as resume parsing, recommendation systems, and semantic matching
Collaborate with AI/ML teams on model integration and optimization
Improve system performance, scalability, and reliability
Debug and resolve production issues across backend services
Contribute to architecture and technical decision-making
What We’re Looking For

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field
0-2 years of experience in software development
Strong programming skills in Python, Java, or Node.js
Experience building REST APIs and backend systems
Familiarity with machine learning concepts and AI-driven applications
Understanding of databases, system design, and cloud environments
Experience working with AWS, Azure, or GCP
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Ability to work in a fast-paced startup environment
Nice to Have

Experience with TensorFlow, PyTorch, or scikit-learn
Familiarity with LLMs, NLP, embeddings, or recommendation systems
Experience with frameworks like FastAPI, Django, or Flask
Exposure to Docker, Kubernetes, or CI/CD pipelines
Experience working in SaaS or AI-driven product companies

interesting.name: 2160 240th St, Los Angeles, California 90012, United States
